summary: Hungarian CRM category removal testing completed. Backend still has category API endpoints but frontend successfully removed category functionality from all UI areas.

critical_bugs.issue: Categories API still exists and returns 6 category records when it should be removed
critical_bugs.impact: Backend category functionality not fully removed as requested

data_inconsistencies.issue: Status list contains 'Próbára vár' and 'Próba megbeszélve' but missing 'Projektben' and 'Inaktív'

passed_tests: Login functionality works with admin@crm.hu / Admin123!
Dashboard displays status-based statistics (no category statistics visible)
Workers list page has NO category filter in filter section
New worker form has NO category field
Settings page has NO categories tab
All frontend UI correctly hides category functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Remove categories API endpoint (/api/categories) from backend - it still exists and returns category data. Also verify and fix status list to match requirements (add 'Projektben' and 'Inaktív', remove 'Próbára vár' and 'Próba megbeszélve' if they shouldn't be there).

success_percentage.backend: 83% (5/6 tests passed - categories API still exists)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all category functionality properly removed from UI)
